title: Fake Features
description: Fake mobs, trees, blocks, etc to trick you and your friends!
body:
# Fake structures, blocks and more!

## **Current features:**
**Structures**
- Fake trees with logs which EXPLODE
- Fake grass patches which summon zombies when broken

**Blocks**
- Fake logs which explode when broken
- Fake grass which summons a random amount of zombies when broken
- Fake stone which spawns silverfish when broken (worse than infested stone)
- Fake sand which lights you on fire
- Quicksand
- Fake diamond ore which drops dangerous fake diamonds
- Fake deepslate which summons either bats, skeletons or creepers when broken, as well as activating other fake deepslate blocks
- Fake redstone ore which drops redstone that makes you randomly drop items in your inventory overtime
- Added fake lapis ore which drops lapis that takes away your xp overtime

**Mobs**
- Fake pig - acts like a normal pig, however attacks the player when hit and does not drop anything
- Fake Creeper - follows the player from a massive range, can leap, is immune to fall damage, and is able to explode repeatedly
- Fake Villager - looks like a normal villager and spawns an evil villager when right clicked
- Evil Villager - attacks the player with emeralds, throws potions when hit, breaks blocks and avoids golems
